title: 3 Strange Facts About Space

segments.text: There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all the world's beaches.
In space, you can't cry because your tear droplets won't fall.
One day on Venus is longer than one year on Venus.
Space is completely silent as there is no medium for sound to travel.
If two pieces of metal touch in space, they will bond permanently.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Space is full of astonishing truths that boggle the mind. Follow for daily facts!
